notes: Executed by the conformance parity runner against the local staged `productSet` path with live fixture variables. The current live API requires `variants[].inventoryQuantities[]` entries to include both `locationId` and quantity `name` (for this capture, `available`) rather than only a bare quantity; the local model still collapses this onto variant inventoryQuantity for first-pass product fidelity.

expectedDifferences.reason: The proxy generates a stable local product GID for the staged productSet create; Shopify returns the dev-store product GID.
Product option IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.
Product option value IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.
Product option value IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.
Product variant IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.
Product variant IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.
Product metafield IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.
The downstream proxy read uses the stable local product GID generated by the staged productSet response.
Shopify returns a store-specific signed preview URL; the proxy returns a stable synthetic local preview URL for staged local-only products.
The downstream proxy read returns the locally generated product option ID.
The downstream proxy read returns the locally generated product option value ID.
The downstream proxy read returns the locally generated product option value ID.
The downstream proxy read returns the locally generated product variant ID.
The downstream proxy read returns the locally generated inventory item ID.
